description: NJDOH: General operating rooms minimum 400 sq ft net clear floor area; cardiac and neuro ORs minimum 600 sq ft.
NJDOH: Single-bed patient room minimum 130 sq ft net clear; two-bed room minimum 110 sq ft per patient.
NJDOH: ICU cubicle minimum 200 sq ft clear; open bay ICU minimum 150 sq ft per patient.
NJDOH: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 140 sq ft per treatment bay; trauma room minimum 250 sq ft.
NJDOH: Patient corridors minimum 8 ft clear width.
NJDOH: Operating rooms 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered supply.
NJDOH: New hospital construction and substantial alterations require NJ DOH Certificate of Need and plan review. CON required for new beds, services, and major capital projects.
citation: N.J.S.A. 26:2H — Health Care Facilities Planning Act / CON

description: NJDOH: Hospital pharmacies with IV admixture compounding require dedicated ISO Class 7 buffer room and ISO Class 5 laminar flow hood per USP 797.
citation: N.J.A.C. 8:43G-18 / NJ Board of Pharmacy USP 797
